'''hababa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avenalin|avenalin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-b-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avenalin|avenalin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hababa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæbæbæth|hæbæbæth]] || [[word:hæbæbæj|hæbæbæj]] || [[word:hæbæbæsh|hæbæbæsh]] || [[word:hæbæbæ|hæbæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:habababath|habababath]] || [[word:habababaj|habababaj]] || [[word:habababash|habababash]] || [[word:habababa|habababa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hababath|hababath]] || [[word:hababaj|hababaj]] || [[word:hababash|hababash]] || [[word:hababa|hababa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:habafbafth|habafbafth]] || [[word:habafbafj|habafbafj]] || [[word:habafbafsh|habafbafsh]] || [[word:habafbaf|habafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hababatha|hababatha]] || [[word:hababaja|hababaja]] || [[word:hababasha|hababasha]] || [[word:hababaka|hababaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hababath|hababath]] || [[word:hababaj|hababaj]] || [[word:hababash|hababash]] || [[word:hababa|hababa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hababathal|hababathal]] || [[word:hababajal|hababajal]] || [[word:hababashal|hababashal]] || [[word:hababakal|hababakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hababaathatha|hababaathatha]] || [[word:hababaajaja|hababaajaja]] || [[word:hababaashasha|hababaashasha]] || [[word:hababaaka|hababaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hababathan|hababathan]] || [[word:hababajan|hababajan]] || [[word:hababashan|hababashan]] || [[word:hababakan|hababakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hababathaoro|hababathaoro]] || [[word:hababajaoro|hababajaoro]] || [[word:hababashaoro|hababashaoro]] || [[word:hababakaoro|hababakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
